subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Spirit, sent down in truth from the presence of the Mighty, the Powerful One, and they speak with truth in the Kingdom of Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الروح نزلت بالحق من لدن عزیز قدیرا و تنطق بالحق فی ملکوت الامر و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
